allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh run watch --repo ameliehenden/Naturfagsreppen --exit-status \(gh run list --repo ameliehenden/Naturfagsreppen --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'\) 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-Content "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\projects\\C--Naturfagsreppen\\9af0e8e1-6eef-47cb-b670-0e1d69027b73.jsonl" | ForEach-Object { try { $j = $_ | ConvertFrom-Json; if \($j.message.role -eq "assistant"\) { $j.message.content | Where-Object { $_.type -eq "tool_use" } | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.name; $cmd = if \($name -eq "Bash" -or $name -eq "PowerShell"\) { $_.input.command } else { "" }; [PSCustomObject]@{tool=$name;cmd=$cmd} } } } catch {} } | Group-Object tool | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "=== $\($_.Name\) ==="; $_.Group | Where-Object { $_.cmd } | ForEach-Object { $_.cmd.Split\("`n"\)[0].Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(120, $_.cmd.Length\)\) } | Group-Object | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.Count\)x $\($_.Name\)" } })
